layman_headline: Fear grips the crypto market — no clean swing trade setups available right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is sitting in a 'Fear' zone at 26/100, with Bitcoin hovering around $64,200. Most altcoins on our watchlist are in bearish chart structures with prices below their key moving averages. While a few coins like ZRO are approaching oversold territory, none have confirmed a reversal with volume or a bullish pattern yet. Jumping in too early during fear-driven selling can lead to catching a falling knife.
layman_action: Stay patient and keep cash ready. Wait for a confirmed bounce or bullish pattern before entering any new position. The market is showing fear, which could eventually create great buying opportunities, but the timing isn't right yet.
expert_reasoning: Every candidate on the watchlist has significant issues. LAB is in freefall (-93.8% in 7 days) with a strongly bearish chart bias of -1.60 — classic falling knife. GRASS dropped 30% in a week but has a bearish engulfing candle and terrible 0.48x risk/reward. VIRTUAL surged 14.6% today but its chart bias is -0.70 and it may already be extended. ETHFI has the best chart bias at +0.60 with a bullish marubozu, but its risk/reward is only 0.11x — essentially already at resistance with no room to run. ZRO is the most interesting with RSI at 31 and excellent theoretical R/R, but price is below all moving averages in a downtrend. With BTC dominance at 56.3% continuing to squeeze alts, and Fear & Greed at 26 (a reliable signal per our track record showing 75% win rate), I want to wait for the fear to capitulate further or for a confirmed reversal before deploying capital. The improving trend in Fear & Greed (23 → 26) suggests we may be near a bottom, but confirmation is needed.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.3% continues to drain liquidity from altcoins — any alt position faces headwinds
Fear & Greed at 26 is improving but could easily reverse lower if BTC breaks below $63K support
All swing candidates show bearish chart structures below key moving averages — no confirmed reversals yet
watch_list: ZRO price action at $0.90 support — a confirmed bounce with volume here would trigger a BUY signal
Fear & Greed index trajectory — a move above 30 combined with declining BTC dominance would favor alt entries
ETHFI breaking above $0.40 resistance with volume — the only candidate with a bullish chart bias (+0.60)
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear regime (26/100) with BTC dominance elevated at 56.3%, creating a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades. BTC itself is relatively stable (+2.5% weekly) but mixed analyst sentiment — some calling late-stage bear, others predicting eventual six-figure prices — reflects deep uncertainty.
context_banner: Market fear is improving but no altcoin has confirmed a reversal — patience is the highest-conviction trade right now.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 and improving from 23 — our most reliable signal (75% win rate) suggests a bounce is building but not yet confirmed.
ZRO RSI at 31 is the only candidate approaching oversold territory — our second-most reliable signal (67% win rate) — but needs confirmation.
Bitcoin described as 'nearing late stages of bear market' by Jamie Coutts at Real Vision, suggesting macro bottom may be forming.
ETH derivatives reset noted, indicating leverage washout that typically precedes healthier price recovery.
BTC dominance at 56.3% remains elevated, signaling capital rotation away from alts — a headwind for any altcoin swing trade entry.
